title: Dns_ResourceRecord
description: Dns_ResourceRecord schema from Censys Platform API

name.description: The Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) this RR is for.

response.description: The RDATA field of the RR.

type.description: An enumerated field indicating what type of data is in the "services.dns.additionals.response" field. For example, "A" signifies that the value in "services.dns.additionals.response" is an IPv4 address for the FQDN in "services.dns.additionals.name".
